name: @hope-ui/themes
description: hope-ui themes — one tree-shakable package, per-theme subpaths (@hope-ui/themes/hope is the default visual identity). Each theme ships a Tailwind v4 CSS file (design tokens as --hope-* CSS variables + an @theme inline mapping to clean utilities) plus a runtime recipe map: import the CSS into your Tailwind entry, pass the recipe map to <ThemeProvider>.
